steps.title: Identify the specific value to be ranked
steps.content: Tribal economic activity totals \$7.3 billion, which must be compared against three industries from the table.

steps.title: Apply the ranking to the table data
steps.content: The \$7.3 billion value ranks above accommodation/food services (\$5.2 billion) but below retail (\$10.7 billion) and health care (\$13.7 billion). The other three choices misrank tribal activity or contradict the relationships in the table. That matches choice A — A is correct.
